entry.title: Granulated Ring
entry.summary:
Vendor: LURI jewels
Type:
Price: 1700.00

Made in 900 gold and granulated in the ancient technique already used thousands of years ago, this ring with a blue topaz is an ode to craftmanship and the beauty of imperfection. 

It is made to order and available with the gemstone of your dreams.

Please contact me for further details.

entry.title: Omega Ring
entry.summary:
Vendor: LURI jewels
Type:
Price: 1400.00

An hommage to colour, the omega ring puts a cabochon cut gem at the centre of attention. Due to the unique nature of gems, every piece is one of a kind. Made in gold 900. New gems will be online soon! 

Do you have a favourite gemstone? Please contact me for your personal version. 

The price may vary according to the gemstone chosen.

entry.title: Colonna Ring
entry.summary:
Vendor: LURI jewels
Type:
Price: 1100.00

Inspired by antique columns, this design symbolises solidity and longevity. It is thus the perfect token of love and friendship, but can also be an everyday reminder to yourself of the inner strength that supports you, always. 

It is made in gold 900 and 5 mm wide.

entry.title: Love Band
entry.summary:
Vendor: LURI jewels
Type:
Price: 800.00 - 1000.00 (88 variants)

A token of love, but even more preciously crafted by hand and in gold 900. The silky surface will polish itself gently with time through the oils of your skin. If you prefer the reflections of a highly polished surface, you can choose this option.

By default, I will produce the ring in traceable gold.

The pictured ring is 3 mm wide, but it can be done in any width, please contact me for customisation.

entry.title: Hammered Ring
entry.summary:
Vendor: LURI jewels
Type:
Price: 1050.00

Rough on the outside, soft on the inside. Playing with contrasts, this ring reminds us that superficial impressions can be deceiving and that it's always worth to look closer.

This ring is made in gold 900 and 3 mm wide, but can be made wider or thinner according to your preferences. You can also add your favourite gems on the out- and inside of the ring. Please contact me for any customisation.

entry.title: Granulated Emerald Studs
entry.summary:
Vendor: LURI jewels
Type:
Price: 350.00

The intense green of these Brazilian emeralds is a perfect combination with the warm colour of the gold 900. Emerald is the birthstone of May and the inclusions in the gems are called jardin - garden, reminding of the green leaves that spring brings back. 

The studs are available also with your personal favourite gem, please contact me for any customisation.

entry.title: Diamond ring
entry.summary:
Vendor: Schuberthan Gold
Type:
Price: 495.00

A diamond sparkling in a bed of gold, framed by granules. This ring is a special gift, a token of love to be worn day by day. 

Would you prefer the shine of a different gemstone or a bigger diamond? Everything is possible, please contact me.

entry.title: Granulated Studs
entry.summary:
Vendor: Schuberthan Gold
Type:
Price: 300.00

A rising sun for your ear stack, these studs are handmade in gold 900.

entry.title: Chain Earrings with Imperial Topaz
entry.summary:
Vendor: LURI jewels
Type:
Price: 1000.00

Dangling on a handwoven Roman loop-in-loop chain, these drops of golden topaz reflect the light in a subtle way. 

Would you like to choose your own favourite gems for a custom design? Please contact me, together we will find the perfect fit.

entry.title: Orbit Ring with Coral
entry.summary:
Vendor: LURI jewels
Type:
Price: 990.00

Corals framed in gold 900 spin around your finger on this floral themed band. The ring is a size 51.

Not your size or do you prefer a different gem? Please contact me, together we will find the perfect fit for you.

entry.title: Signet Ring with Cordella and Peridot
entry.summary:
Vendor: LURI jewels
Type:
Price: 1100.00

The shape and texture of this signet ring in gold 900 remind of antique treasures unearthed. It holds the fascination of history while its timeless design fits your everyday style.

The ring is a size 49 and cannot be resized. Do you wear a different size or prefer another gem? Please contact me, together we will find the perfect fit for you. 

As all LURI pieces, this ring is crafted entirely by hand with responsibly sourced materials.

entry.title: Signet Ring with Imperial Topaz
entry.summary:
Vendor: LURI jewels
Type:
Price: 900.00

A harmony of golden shades, this combination of gold 900 and an imperial topaz will brighten your every day. It has a classic pinky ring shape, but fits well also on other fingers. This ring is a size 50.

Do you wear a different size or would you like to choose your own favourite gem for a custom design? Please contact me, together we will find the perfect fit.

entry.title: Helios Ring
entry.summary:
Vendor: Schuberthan Gold
Type:
Price: 1900.00

A statement piece in 900 gold. Its' repetition in variation of the round shape reminds of the cyclic nature of all things. Spin it around your finger for concentration and calmness. Let the warm glow of the alloy brighten up your mind.

entry.title: Handmade Paperclip Chain
entry.summary:
Vendor: Schuberthan Gold
Type:
Price: 1650.00 - 2000.00 (2 variants)

A handmade, 18 karat gold necklace. Worn on its own it adds a touch of minimalistic elegance to any outfit. In combination with your favourite pendants it becomes the expression of your personal style and your story. 

As all LURI pieces, this necklace is crafted entirely by hand.

entry.title: Tourmaline and Pearl Earrings
entry.summary:
Vendor: LURI jewels
Type:
Price: 1050.00

The colour of these tourmalines changes with the light between a mysterious grey and a celestial blue. Combined with the soft shimmer of white pearls and the warm glow of gold 900 - a festive dream! 

They can be made with other precious gems and pearls, too. Please contact me, together we will create your personal favourite combination.

entry.title: Leo Charm
entry.summary:
Vendor: My Store
Type:
Price: 550.00

Charismatic and generous, everyone is attracted by leo's magnetic field. As a natural leader this star sign will take care of the well being of his family and beyond and loves the recognition for these efforts.

This pendant is made in 18 karat gold.

Dimensions: approximately 21 x 15 x 2 mm.

entry.title: Cancer Charm
entry.summary:
Vendor: My Store
Type:
Price: 550.00

A very sensitive character, cancers have great intuition and empathy and deeply care about their beloved ones. Nonetheless, they are determined and ambitious to reach their life goals.

This pendant is made in 18 karat gold.

Dimensions: approximately 21 x 15 x 2 mm.

entry.title: Gemini Charm
entry.summary:
Vendor: My Store
Type:
Price: 550.00

Curious and talkative, you will never get bored with a gemini! As they are always well informed about the latest trends and love to entertain, their energy and optimism is inspiring and contagious. 

This pendant is made in 18 karat gold.

Dimensions: approximately 21 x 15 x 2 mm.

entry.title: Virgo Charm
entry.summary:
Vendor: My Store
Type:
Price: 550.00

Deeply connected to the earth, a virgo takes decisions according to analytical reasoning and practical considerations. Striving for meaningfulness in life, this star sign has an authentic and strong character.

This pendant is made in 18 karat gold.

Dimensions: approximately 21 x 15 x 2 mm.

entry.title: Taurus Charm
entry.summary:
Vendor: My Store
Type:
Price: 550.00

Down to earth but with a weakness for luxury, a taurus is reliable and solid as a rock. Living in the here and now, it makes the best out of everyday life instead of dreaming up castles in the air.

This pendant is made in 18 karat gold.

Dimensions: approximately 21 x 15 x 2 mm.

entry.title: Aries Charm
entry.summary:
Vendor: My Store
Type:
Price: 550.00

Always up for a challenge and a fresh start, aries is full of energy and enthusiasm. With its great optimism and the concentration on the positive side, for this star sign everything is reachable.

This pendant is made in 18 karat gold.

Dimensions: approximately 21 x 15 x 2 mm.

entry.title: Pisces Charm
entry.summary:
Vendor: My Store
Type:
Price: 550.00

With creativity and intuition pisces follow the transformations in life effortlessly. Their natural connection to their inner feelings and their empathy for others make them a sensible character, living between reality and imagination.

This pendant is made in 18 karat gold.

Dimensions: approximately 21 x 15 x 2 mm.

entry.title: Capricorn Charm
entry.summary:
Vendor: My Store
Type:
Price: 550.00

Reliability and perseverance are core characteristics of a capricorn. Once its trust is won, it will stay loyal and never let you down. 

This pendant is made in 18 karat gold.

Dimensions: approximately 21 x 15 x 2 mm.

entry.title: Libra Charm
entry.summary:
Vendor: My Store
Type:
Price: 550.00

Open to all opinions, a libra seeks truth, justice and harmony while never forgetting about the value of beauty, fun and pleasure.

This pendant is made in 18 karat gold.

Dimensions: approximately 21 x 15 x 2 mm.

entry.title: Scorpio Charm
entry.summary:
Vendor: My Store
Type:
Price: 550.00

Emotional and intellectual depth make the scorpio a fascinating character, that in turn will always prefer honesty and authenticity over superficial shine.

This pendant is made in 18 karat gold.

Dimensions: approximately 21 x 15 x 2 mm.
